title: coelandria chrysoglossa
intro: Coelandria chrysoglossa is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the yellow-tongued coelandria. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Coelandria chrysoglossa include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to exhibit antifungal and antibacterial properties. Coelandria chrysoglossa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and topical creams, and is traditionally used in Australian Aboriginal medicine.
